body: Grace honey — which days does Maya have practice out at Corcoran? I can never keep the schedule straight.
Tuesdays and Thursdays. Leaving Keystone at 5 to get her by 5:30. Fair warning she usually comes off the field looking like she lost a fight with the infield.
Give her a kiss from me. Are you eating a real dinner tonight or is it a granola bar over the sink again?
I have the soup from Sunday. Real bowl and everything.
Maya's practice runs until 6 but I've got a filing due at 5:30 — Daniel said he'd watch the Corcoran pickup if I'm not out in time. Just flagging in case you're near that side of town.
I can grab her! I'm at Wegmans on Erie anyway. What time do I need to be at the fields?
6:15 to be safe. She'll be sweaty and dramatic about it, fair warning.
That's just Tuesday. I'll bring a towel 😄
Dad, Maya's first away game is Friday at Nottingham — 4pm. Can you make it? Ruth's coming if you want to carpool from her place.
Oh I'll be there. Haven't seen that girl play since last season. Tell her her grandfather expects a goal.
Ha. I'll pass that along right before warmups so she has *plenty* of time to think about it.
That's called motivation, Gracie. Ask your lawyer friends.
did mom tell you grandma ruth got confused about where she was again yesterday? she called mom three times in an hour thinking she was still in rochester
ugh no. mom didn't say anything to me. how bad was it
bad enough. i'm calling mom tonight after practice — maya's got field hockey til 6 so i'll have the car ride
ok loop me in. i hate being the last to know about this stuff

Lorraine — quick one. Maya's been asking about legal aid as a career path after field hockey practice yesterday. Should I set her up with a Keystone shadow day or is that too much too soon for a high schooler?

Not too soon at all. Kids that age need to see the unglamorous version before they romanticize it. One caveat: put her in intake, not court. Let her watch a benefits denial interview before anything else.
Fair point. The intake reality check weeds out the ones who just want the TV version. I'll talk to Daniel about scheduling something — he runs intake Tuesdays now.
Good. And Grace — the fact that she's asking you means you're doing something right on that sideline. Don't undersell that. ☎️
Did Lorraine sign off on the Morales brief or are we still in revisions hell?
She signed. Filed 20 min ago. Buy me a coffee and I'll tell you what she changed at the last second.
Deal. Gimme 10, I'm still pulling the Hendricks intake.
Room 2 when you're done. And Daniel — bring the good coffee, not the pot that's been sitting since 8.

Howard, Grace Hatfield from Keystone. Your DSS fair hearing is confirmed for July 9th at 2pm downtown. I still need that employer letter we discussed — can you get it to our Syracuse office by Thursday EOD?
Yes I can do that. Should I drop it off or can I email a scan? My car's been in the shop since Sunday.
Scan works — ghatfield@keystonelegalaid.org. Make sure the letterhead is legible, we're submitting the full packet Friday morning.
Will do, sending it tonight. Thank you Grace, seriously. I didn't know where else to turn with this.
Running late — motion deadline got bumped up and I'm still at Keystone. Can you start warmups at Corcoran without me? Should be there by 4:30.
Already here, got it. Did you want me to run the corner press drill or hold it til you're in?
Run it. They need the reps more than they need me watching. Save the set piece review for when I get there.
Done. Also heads up — far goal net has a tear, grounds crew said tomorrow. Wanted to warn you before you walked up and saw it yourself.
leaving keystone in 20 to get Maya to Corcoran for practice — told Lorraine I'd cover pickup since she's in Rochester. of course my 3pm call ran long 🙄
Classic. Is Maya ready or is this another 'I forgot my stick' situation
She texted 'ready' at 2:45 so fingers crossed. already mentally planning a Wegmans stop on the way back tbh
You are literally parenting Lorraine's kid. Does she know this?
Hey Grace — just confirming Thursday at 4. Also caught the Post-Standard piece on the Keystone housing ruling. That's a real win for your clients.
Thursday's good. And yes — Daniel drafted the key argument. I filed it. He deserves the headline.
That tracks with what you've said about him. See you Thursday.
4pm. I'll be there.
Hey, Lorraine's retirement dinner is confirmed Friday 5pm at Curious — you're still good to say a few words, right? You know her longer than anyone at Keystone.
I'm in. Cap me at 2 minutes or I'll write remarks structured like a motion in limine and nobody wants that.
Ha. Also — Daniel mentioned you covered his intake shift Tuesday while he was at the Erie County hearing. That was above and beyond.
He would've done the same. I had 40 minutes before Maya's practice anyway, wasn't going anywhere useful.

Patricia — bedroom HVAC is dripping onto the sill again, same spot as last March. I'm in federal court Wed and Thu. Can Mike come Monday or Tuesday before 9? I can leave a key with my neighbor if needed.
Hi Grace! Monday works, I'll send Mike around 8am. Does that still work for you?
8am Monday is fine — I'm out by 8:45 for Keystone so just tell him not to linger past that. If I'm not there I'll leave the key under the mat.
Got it! Sorry for the repeat issue with that unit, I'll have him check the drainage line while he's there too.
Hey, does Maya still need a ride to Corcoran Thursday? I'm out near Solvay anyway and could swing it if it helps.
She's covered, I confirmed this morning. But noted — Emma might need that favor sometime when I'm stuck in federal court.
Ha, deal. How's the Keystone caseload treating you?
Like it always does in summer. Three eviction hearings before August. I'll survive.

Grace, your labs from Thursday are in. Vitamin D is at 21 ng/mL — low again, which honestly tracks for Syracuse in June. I'd start a D3 supplement if you're not already. 2000 IU daily, generic is fine.
Figured as much. I basically live in the courthouse or on a yoga mat, neither of which involves sunlight. I'll grab some. Anything else flagged?
Cortisol on the afternoon draw came back elevated. Probably just timing — those samples are noisy — but I want to retest fasting before we read into it. Can you come in early one morning?
I can do a Tuesday before 7am, I'm usually up anyway. I'll book through the portal. Thanks for actually catching that instead of just sending a form letter.
Hey Grace — just confirming your cleaning Thursday at 2pm. We had a note you might need to leave by 3:30 for field hockey pickup?
Yep, Maya's 4pm practice at Corcoran. Should be fine as long as x-rays don't take forever like last time.
Ha, no promises, but I'll tell Sarah to move you up first. Also meant to ask — your mom Linda still coming in next week?
She is. Fair warning, she'll spend half the appointment asking if you went to Cornell. She does this with every professional she meets in Syracuse. Just smile and nod.
Maya's practice at Corcoran runs til 6:30 — can you cover the 5pm Guerrero intake? Daniel said he might be free but I haven't heard back.
Yeah I can take it. Guerrero is the eviction matter right, 3 kids?
That's the one. Petition's in the shared drive. Tell her we're filing the emergency stay Friday if the landlord doesn't respond by noon tomorrow.
Got it. Good luck at pickup — does Maya know you're coming or is this another ambush from the parking lot?
Saw the Corcoran game highlights — your girl Maya is an absolute menace at midfield. You must be losing your mind watching from the sideline 😂
She scored twice Thursday and I found out via group chat because I was in a bond hearing until 6. Parenting on a delay.
Classic Grace Hatfield, present in spirit via case law. Does she even know you're her biggest fan?
She knows. I showed up to Saturday practice in my Keystone lanyard and she pretended not to see me. Teenager behavior, fully earned.
Hey Grace — Maya left her field hockey stick propped against your door. Heading to Corcoran pickup soon or should I just leave it?
Oh god. Yes leaving in 10, just grabbed it. She'd show up to practice with a water bottle and good intentions.
Ha. You want me to grab your mail while you're gone? Looks like a stack building up.
Please. I've been in federal court filings since 6am, mail is a tomorrow problem. Key's under the mat, you know the drill.
Grace — heads up, Coach DiMatteo moved Thursday's practice to 4:30. You're still listed as Maya's pickup. Just want to make sure you can still make it to Corcoran by 6?
I can't — I've got a motion deadline Thursday and I'll be at Keystone til at least 6:30. Any chance you can take her? I'll cover the next two Saturdays.
Done, I've got her. Dropping off at your place after — same address on file?
Yes, Westmoreland Ave. You're a lifesaver Karen. I owe you one.
hey grace did you end up finding a field hockey ref for Maya's Thursday practice at Corcoran? i know your schedule is brutal mid-week
we're covered — Daniel ended up knowing someone through his rec league. crisis averted before I even filed the motion 😅
nice. how's Maya doing with the team this season?
she's good. I just need to actually make it to a practice instead of reading intake forms in the parking lot. progress.
